rows.description: Computus Dni Rectoris a 2do Die Novr 1814
rows.notes: Clear page title at very top. Handwriting legible though slightly flourished; no monetary columns present on this line.
rows.section_header: Computus Dni Rectoris a 2do Die Novr 1814

rows.notes: Directly beneath the page title; reads as a date/heading. No amounts visible in the £/s/d columns.
Section label (Latin). Word is slightly abbreviated / old spelling but clearly a heading; no numbers in the money columns.
Clear section header indicating start of fixed money rents. No monetary values on this line.

Rightmost pounds column clearly shows '135' aligned with the pounds vertical line; shillings and pence positions are blank (dashes). Small uncertainty in exact parish name spelling but numeric value is clear and in valid range.
rows.english_description: Rent due from the Spinicar rectory.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent due from the Spinicar rectory, amounting to £135 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Pounds column clearly reads '136' (to the right). Handwritten place name is less clear (interpreted as 'Menheniot'); shillings/pence blank. Chosen 136 based on clear digits in pounds column.
rows.english_description: Rent due from the Menheniot estate.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent due from the Menheniot estate, amounting to £136 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Short place/name line with no amount in the money columns. Handwriting moderately legible; likely a sub-item or place label with amount shown elsewhere.
rows.english_description: Rent from The Tew (property entry under money rents).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from The Tew; amount not recorded in the structured fields.

rows.notes: Rightmost pounds column shows '10' aligned with the pounds line. Name 'Banwell' readable. No shillings/pence indicated (dashes).
rows.english_description: Rent from the Banwell property.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from the Banwell property, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Clear section header. No monetary figures on this header line.
Place name legible but no amount on this line. It appears to introduce a sub-item below (vicarage).
rows.english_description: Entry for the Eddington rectory under redeemed land tax.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Land tax redemption entry for the Eddington rectory; amount not recorded in the structured fields.

rows.notes: The abbreviation 'do' (ditto) precedes 'Vicarage'. Amount at right reads '4.19.' which aligns to £4, 19s, 0d. Pounds/shillings alignment clear; pence column blank.
rows.english_description: Land-tax redemption entry for the Eddington vicarage.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Land-tax redemption entry for the Eddington vicarage, amounting to £4 19s 0d.

rows.notes: Section heading clearly written ('Fixed Rents Variable'). No monetary figure on header line.
Amount reads '171.11.-' in the £/s/d columns. Columns aligned with ruled lines; pence blank. Handwriting of place name interpreted as 'St. Newington'.
rows.english_description: Variable fixed rent received from St. Newington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Variable fixed rent received from St. Newington, amounting to £171 11s 0d.

rows.notes: Amount clearly reads '42.9.4½' — interpreted as £42, 9s, 4½d (halfpenny indicated by the small loop). Columns alignment confirms positions. Text '2 Years' visible after entry.

rows.notes: Right column reads '18.4.11' aligned to £/s/d. Parish name is somewhat unclear ('Garnington Clinkard' is best reading). All numeric columns within valid ranges.
